text:
RNS Announcement: Existing Warrants - Voluntary Purchase Offer

The Smarter Web Company announces its intention to make a discounted voluntary purchase offer for all holders of existing warrants granted in April 2025, exercisable between 24 April 2026 and 24 April 2028, to enable Pre-IPO Warrant holders to realise value from their warrants ahead of their vesting.

Please read the RNS on our website (link in comments).

LSE: #SWC | OTCQB: $TSWCF | FRA: $3M8

text:
Sponsor focus: Bitcoin Treasuries Unconference UK.

We are pleased to have support from Africa Bitcoin Corporation for this event.

Africa Bitcoin Corporation is a Bitcoin Backed, SME Growth Accelerator. They accumulate Bitcoin in their treasury and use this Bitcoin as collateral to access cheap funding across the globe. This in turn allows them to offer growth capital at affordable rates to SME’s in Africa who face exorbitant costs of capital.

We are pleased to have them supporting the conversation around Bitcoin as digital capital.

Join us in Bristol, UK. Real conversations. Real strategies. Real builders.

Hosted by The Smarter Web Company × Bitcoin Treasuries Media on 29 May 2026. Secure your ticket today (link in comments).

text:
RNS Announcement: Quarterly Investor Update

The Smarter Web Company provides an investor update for the first three months of 2026. This marks the first of the Company’s planned regular quarterly investor updates, which the Company intends to publish following the end of each calendar quarter. These updates will provide shareholders with key business highlights and notable developments during the relevant period.

Please read the RNS on our website (link in comments).
